name: Westminster National Golf Course
about: Westminster National Golf Course is an 18-hole daily fee golf course set within the farmland and rolling hills of Carroll County, Maryland. The facility operates as a family-run business and features both a traditional outdoor course and an indoor golf simulator space known as the Track Shack. It is positioned as a well-maintained, high-value option for golfers in the Mid-Atlantic region. The venue provides a complete golf experience with amenities like a driving range, practice greens, a pro shop, lessons, and a banquet room, alongside its indoor golf technology offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for data-rich practice and lessons
Convenient location near Westminster and Littlestown
Family-friendly environment with dedicated junior lesson programs

food_and_drink.notes: On-site snack bar available. banquet room available for events.
No mention of alcohol service. BYOB policy is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for indoor lessons and simulator play.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available for the simulator. It is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a snack bar and banquet room, but a policy on outside food and drink is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers specific junior lesson programs for ages 12 and under, indicating it is family-friendly.
